title: Bitcoin Weigh-In Daily Commodity Price Dataset
abstract: Daily commodity prices denominated in Bitcoin, 2013-present. Raw USD closes for BTC, gold, silver, platinum, copper, Brent crude, wheat, and coffee, plus derived per-BTC values and a deterministically computed BTC circulating supply.

provenance.licenseOfUnderlyingSource: CoinGecko keyless public API (free for non-commercial use; attribution requested)
provenance.notes: CoinGecko market-chart USD price aggregated across major spot exchanges; the daily cron records the last point of each UTC day. Migrated from Stooq 2026-06-13 after Stooq began blocking automated access.

provenance.licenseOfUnderlyingSource: CoinGecko keyless public API (free for non-commercial use; attribution requested)
provenance.notes: Proxy for spot gold per troy ounce, USD, via Pax Gold (PAXG) — a token redeemable 1:1 for a fine troy ounce of LBMA Good Delivery gold, which trades within a small premium of spot. Migrated from Stooq 2026-06-13.
Spot silver per troy ounce, USD, from GoldAPI.io. Migrated from Stooq 2026-06-13 after Stooq began blocking automated access.
Spot platinum per troy ounce, USD. Not rendered in the launch UI; daily updates stopped 2026-06-13 when Stooq was dropped. Historical values retained in the dataset.
Continuous front-month copper futures (COMEX), USD per pound. Not rendered in the launch UI; daily updates stopped 2026-06-13 when Stooq was dropped. Historical values retained in the dataset.
Europe Brent spot price FOB, USD per barrel.
Continuous front-month CBOT wheat futures, USD per bushel. Never rendered in the launch UI; daily updates stopped 2026-06-13 when Stooq was dropped. Historical values retained in the dataset.

Continuous front-month ICE Arabica coffee futures, normalised to USD per pound. Never rendered in the launch UI; daily updates stopped 2026-06-13 when Stooq was dropped. Historical values retained in the dataset.

Computed in scripts/sources.ts as a pure function of days-since-genesis (2009-01-03), 144 blocks/day target, 50 BTC initial reward, halving every 210,000 blocks. Unit-tested against known halving block dates.

provenance.originalSource: DOE Office of Nuclear Energy / NASA Planetary Science / Cassini OIG (1997) escalated to 2024
provenance.notes: No spot market exists. Composite material-cost estimate (~$5,000/g midpoint of $4,000-$8,000) drives the visualisation; fully-loaded program cost (~$100,000/g) cited separately on the methodology page. Lives in src/lib/illustrative-prices.json, not in prices.json.

provenance.originalSource: UNODC World Drug Report / DEA NDTA / EMCDDA
provenance.notes: Three-tier pricing (producer / wholesale / retail-pure-equivalent). Wholesale is the primary tier for BTC-equivalence. Lives in src/lib/illustrative-prices.json, not in prices.json.

forward_fill_provenance.note: Per-row forward-fill provenance is not tracked in v1.0; the forward_filled column is empty for all rows. Prospective tracking begins in v1.1.
